Metadata.homeTitle: Mekiki Research | Japan Property Analysis — Price & Risk in Seconds

AboutPage.heroBadge: Japan MLIT Official Data × AI-aggregated public data
AboutPage.heroTitle: Official Gov Data & Expert Analysis to Precisely Evaluate Properties.
AboutPage.heroDesc: Enter coordinates and instantly generate transaction price trends, hazard risk assessment, 10-section area characteristics, and expert insights. A precision research tool for real estate agents, investors, and property buyers in Japan.
AboutPage.heroNote: No credit card required · Start instantly with Google
AboutPage.featuresSectionTitle: Everything from Research to Presentation, on One Page
AboutPage.featuresSectionDesc: Cut hours of property research down to seconds. All the information professionals need, in one place.
AboutPage.f0desc: Based on actual transaction data from Japan's MLIT Property Information Library, instantly display average unit prices and price trend charts for the surrounding area — giving you objective data to support price negotiations.
AboutPage.f1desc: Display flood, landslide, and earthquake risks linked to official hazard maps. View zoning, school district, nearest station, and medical facilities — all in one place.
AboutPage.f2desc: Generate a detailed report covering area overview, demographics, development trends, public transaction data statistics, future outlook, and area data summaries — 10 sections in total. Dramatically streamline pre-negotiation research.
AboutPage.f3desc: Generate realistic lifestyle images reflecting the area's actual features (snowy regions, urban areas, coastal towns, etc.) — perfect for client presentation materials.
AboutPage.f4desc: One-click PDF export of a full research report including price summary, hazard data, charts, area report, and transaction listings. Customise which sections to include for client presentations.
AboutPage.f5desc: Automatically save past research results and images to the cloud. Replay any past search instantly — ideal for ongoing area research and comparing multiple properties.
AboutPage.pricingSectionDesc: From a no-signup trial to a full pro plan. Start for free.
AboutPage.footerCredit: Uses Japan MLIT Property Information Library data (CC BY 4.0)

TermsPage.title: Terms of Service
TermsPage.s1p1: These Terms of Service govern the use of the web service "{service}" provided by {operator} ("Operator") between the Operator and all users ("Users").
TermsPage.s1p2: By using this service, Users are deemed to have agreed to all provisions of these Terms.
TermsPage.s2p1: This service is a web application that combines publicly available data from Japan's MLIT Property Information Library and other sources with AI-aggregated public data analysis to provide reference information on property markets in user-specified areas.
TermsPage.s2d1: Information provided by this service does not constitute a formal real estate appraisal under Japan's Real Estate Appraisal Act.
TermsPage.s2d2: Information provided by this service does not constitute investment advice or solicitation under Japan's Financial Instruments and Exchange Act.
TermsPage.s2d3: All information provided is for reference only. For any real estate purchase, sale, or investment decision, please consult a qualified professional (licensed real estate agent, appraiser, etc.) and act at your own responsibility.
TermsPage.s3i1: Some features require login via a Google account (Firebase Authentication).
TermsPage.s3i2: Users are responsible for the management of their own Google accounts.
TermsPage.s3i3: If unauthorised use of an account occurs, please contact the Operator immediately.
TermsPage.s3i4: Sharing a single account among multiple people is prohibited.
TermsPage.s4i1: This service offers a free plan and a paid Pro plan (¥980/month incl. tax). Features and limits follow what is displayed within the service.
TermsPage.s4i2: Paid plan payments are processed through Lemon Squeezy. Credit card information is managed directly by Lemon Squeezy and is not stored on Operator servers.
TermsPage.s4i3: The Pro plan may be cancelled at any time. Upon cancellation, access continues until the end of the billing month. No pro-rated refunds are provided, except for service-critical failures.
TermsPage.s4i4: If fees are changed, the Operator will notify Users at least 30 days in advance via the service or email. Users who do not agree to the change may cancel their plan before the change takes effect.
TermsPage.s5lead: Users must not engage in the following activities when using this service:
TermsPage.s5i1: Automated data collection (scraping, crawling, etc.) of service data or content
TermsPage.s5i2: Reverse engineering, decompiling, or disassembling the service
TermsPage.s5i3: Transferring, lending, or sharing accounts with third parties
TermsPage.s5i4: Unauthorised commercial use or resale of information obtained through this service
TermsPage.s5i5: Placing excessive load on the service's servers
TermsPage.s5i6: Any activity that violates laws or public order and morals
TermsPage.s5i7: Any other activity deemed inappropriate by the Operator
TermsPage.s6i1: All information provided by this service is for reference only. The Operator makes no guarantees as to accuracy, completeness, or timeliness. In no event shall the Operator's total liability for any damages exceed the monthly subscription fee paid by the User in the month in which the damage occurred, regardless of cause. This limitation does not apply to damages caused by the Operator's wilful misconduct or gross negligence.
TermsPage.s6i2: The Operator accepts no liability for damages caused by system failures, maintenance, or outages of third-party services (Firebase, Lemon Squeezy, MLIT API, etc.).
TermsPage.s6i3: The Operator may change or discontinue the service without prior notice.
TermsPage.s62i1: Area analysis reports and lifestyle images are automatically generated using generative AI (Gemini, Imagen, etc.) provided by Google LLC.
TermsPage.s62i2: AI-generated content may not reflect the latest information and may contain inaccuracies. Always verify with up-to-date sources before use.
TermsPage.s62i3: The Operator accepts no liability for any damages arising from AI-generated content.
TermsPage.s62i4: AI-generated images are illustrative only and do not guarantee the appearance or conditions of the actual area.
TermsPage.s63p1: Transaction price and hazard data provided by this service is derived from the following data sources, used in accordance with their respective licences.
TermsPage.s63i1: Japan MLIT Property Information Library (CC BY 4.0) — Transaction data
TermsPage.s63i2: Japan MLIT Hazard Map Portal — Flood & landslide risk data
TermsPage.s63i3: Geospatial Information Authority of Japan (GSI) Map Tiles — Map display
TermsPage.s7p1: Copyright and other intellectual property rights in the content (text, design, logos, report text, etc.) included in this service belong to the Operator or the respective rights holders.
TermsPage.s8p1: The Operator may amend these Terms without obtaining individual consent from Users, pursuant to Article 548-4 of the Civil Code of Japan. When making such amendments, the Operator will notify Users of the changes and the amended Terms via the service or email a reasonable period before the amendments take effect.
TermsPage.s9p1: These Terms are governed by the laws of Japan. Any disputes shall be subject to the exclusive jurisdiction of the Tokyo District Court as the court of first instance.
TermsPage.s4i5: Paid plans may be cancelled through the Lemon Squeezy customer portal. Please visit 'Manage Subscription' on your profile page to cancel. After cancellation, you may continue to use the Pro plan until the end of the current billing period.

PrivacyPage.title: Privacy Policy
PrivacyPage.intro: {operator} ("Operator") sets out this Privacy Policy regarding the handling of personal information in {service} ("Service").
PrivacyPage.s1lead: When providing this service, we may collect the following information.
PrivacyPage.s1r1timing: Upon Google account sign-in or waitlist registration
PrivacyPage.s1r2timing: Upon Google account sign-in (retrieved from Google profile)
PrivacyPage.s1r3timing: When a logged-in user performs a property search
PrivacyPage.s1r5timing: When using a paid plan (collected by Lemon Squeezy)
PrivacyPage.s2lead: Collected personal information is used only for the following purposes.
PrivacyPage.s2i1: Providing, operating, and improving this service
PrivacyPage.s2i3: Billing and payment processing for paid plans
PrivacyPage.s2i4: Displaying search history and improving usability
PrivacyPage.s2i5: Sending important notices about the service
PrivacyPage.s3lead: This service uses the following third-party services, each subject to their own privacy policies.
PrivacyPage.s4p1: The Operator will not provide Users' personal information to third parties except in the following cases.
PrivacyPage.s4i2: When required by law (lawful request from courts, police, or other public authorities)
PrivacyPage.s4i3: When necessary to protect life, body, or property, and obtaining the User's consent is difficult
PrivacyPage.s5p1: The Operator implements appropriate security measures (access controls, encryption, etc.) to prevent leakage, loss, or damage to personal information.
PrivacyPage.s6lead: Users have the following rights regarding their personal information.
PrivacyPage.s6i1: Request for disclosure, correction, or deletion
PrivacyPage.s6i2: Request to stop use or third-party disclosure
PrivacyPage.s6p2: Please contact us at the address below to make a request. We will respond within a reasonable period after verifying your identity.
PrivacyPage.s7p1: This service uses cookies and similar technologies (local storage, etc.) to improve the service. You may disable cookies in your browser settings, though some features may not function correctly.
PrivacyPage.s72title: Article 7-2 — Disclosure of Data Sent to Third Parties
PrivacyPage.s72p1: In accordance with Article 27-12 of Japan's Telecommunications Business Act, we disclose the following information sent from users' devices to third parties.
PrivacyPage.s8p1: The Operator may revise this Policy as necessary. In case of significant changes, notice will be provided on the service or by email.
PrivacyPage.contactLead: For requests regarding disclosure, correction, or deletion of personal information, or other privacy enquiries, please contact us below.

LandingPage.heroTitle: Uncover the real price and risk of any Japan property — in 30 seconds, powered by MLIT data and AI
LandingPage.heroDesc: Just enter coordinates or an address. We instantly generate transaction prices, hazard risk, and a 10-section AI area report. Stronger decisions for home buyers, investors, and agents — backed by data.
LandingPage.heroNote: No credit card · First report in 30 seconds
LandingPage.featuresTitle: Three strengths the pros rely on
LandingPage.featuresDesc: A unique stack: MLIT data × Open-Meteo first-party sources × AI insight.
LandingPage.f0Desc: An original AI report covering 10 sections — demographics, development trends, investment value, and outlook. Use it directly as a draft for sales material or self-study.
LandingPage.f1Desc: MLIT hazard maps, Open-Meteo weather data, and energy-efficiency standards combined on one screen. Flood, landslide, and earthquake risk are visible at a glance.
LandingPage.f2Desc: District-level filtering, price-trend charts by property type, and automatic unit-price calculation — the granularity real estate professionals actually need.
LandingPage.audienceDesc: Close the information gap with data.
LandingPage.a0Desc: Is the asking price fair? What about disaster risk? Replace uncertainty with data, so the biggest purchase of your life isn't a leap of faith.
LandingPage.a1Desc: Screen profitability, liquidity, and future outlook with objective MLIT data and AI analysis. Sharpen your judgment — and accelerate it.
LandingPage.a2Desc: Cut research time dramatically. Export PDF and use it directly in client meetings and proposals — measurably stronger sales.
LandingPage.bottomCtaTitle: Run your first report — free, right now
LandingPage.bottomCtaDesc: No signup, no credit card. Just enter coordinates or an address, and the report is ready instantly.
